headline: Analysis: Carnival Cruise makes a move Royal Caribbean must copy
summary: As a seasoned cruiser who has sailed Royal Caribbean, Carnival, Norwegian, and MSC Cruises over the past year, there's one complaint I hear quite often. "There are too many kids on this cruise." I've heard that on Royal Caribbean ships with over a thousand kids and on a Celebrity Cruises trip with ...
